goals.name: Deliver Long An factory expansion phase 1

pm_projects.name: Coastal Resort — EPC Project Management
pm_projects.members: Dung Nguyen, Son Nguyen, Trung Nguyen
pm_projects.objectives: Manage EPC delivery of a 120-key beachfront resort to opening date and budget.
pm_projects.scopeSummary: Full PMC scope: design, procurement, construction supervision, C&Q and handover.
pm_projects.successCriteria: Handover on schedule; CPI/SPI ≥ 0.95; zero major NCRs at DLP.

pm_projects.name: Riverside Tower — Construction Supervision
pm_projects.members: Dung Nguyen, Son Nguyen, Trung Nguyen
pm_projects.objectives: Independent construction supervision of a 28-floor mixed-use tower.
pm_projects.scopeSummary: Full PMC scope: design, procurement, construction supervision, C&Q and handover.
pm_projects.successCriteria: Handover on schedule; CPI/SPI ≥ 0.95; zero major NCRs at DLP.

pm_projects.name: Metro Line 3 — Station Fit-out PMC
pm_projects.members: Dung Nguyen, Son Nguyen, Trung Nguyen
pm_projects.objectives: PMC for architectural & MEP fit-out of 4 underground stations to CRA standards.
pm_projects.scopeSummary: Full PMC scope: design, procurement, construction supervision, C&Q and handover.
pm_projects.successCriteria: Handover on schedule; CPI/SPI ≥ 0.95; zero major NCRs at DLP.

pm_projects.name: Bao Minh Factory Expansion — Design Management
pm_projects.members: Dung Nguyen, Son Nguyen, Trung Nguyen
pm_projects.objectives: Design management for a GMP pharma factory expansion (DQ/IQ/OQ ready).
pm_projects.scopeSummary: Full PMC scope: design, procurement, construction supervision, C&Q and handover.
pm_projects.successCriteria: Handover on schedule; CPI/SPI ≥ 0.95; zero major NCRs at DLP.

pm_projects.name: Sunrise Industrial Park Ph.2 — Cost & Contract Mgmt
pm_projects.members: Dung Nguyen, Son Nguyen, Trung Nguyen
pm_projects.objectives: Cost & contract management for Phase-2 industrial park infrastructure.
pm_projects.scopeSummary: Full PMC scope: design, procurement, construction supervision, C&Q and handover.
pm_projects.successCriteria: Handover on schedule; CPI/SPI ≥ 0.95; zero major NCRs at DLP.
